exploration_notes: The Cephx authentication protocol in Ceph spans two main directories. In src/auth/cephx/: CephxServiceHandler (server-side auth handling), CephxClientHandler (client-side auth), CephxProtocol.h (defines protocol message types CEPHX_GET_AUTH_SESSION_KEY, CEPHX_GET_PRINCIPAL_SESSION_KEY, CEPHX_GET_ROTATING_KEY plus CephXAuthorizer struct), CephxKeyServer (KeyServer class for key rotation and ticket generation), CephxAuthorizeHandler (authorize verification), CephxSessionHandler (session-level cryp
